chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-301 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For non prosecution. ------ 15.09.2025 Mr. Manzoor Ali Kalhoro, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------ Notices in this petition were ordered to be issued on 28.08.2025. However, learned counsel for the petitioner failed to deposit the process fee and to supply the memo of petition in the office. Counsel now seeks time to comply with the same. Since the petitioner seeks protection, therefore, this petition is disposed of with directions to the official respondents to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and not to cause any harassment to the petitioner. Judge Manzoor
